titleStmt.title: Amarakoṣa, with excerpts from a Sinhalese commentary (ed. Guṇaśekara, n.d.)

msContents.summary: This extract comes from the Siṃhala Granthārṇavaya, a collection of Sinhalese texts compiled by Abraham Mendis Guṇaśekara. No date is given in the book, but it was likely published near the beginning of the 20th century. These photographs are from the copy kept at the Staatsbibliothek zu Berlin.

listBibl.bibl: Vogel, Claus. 2013. Indian Lexicography. Revised edition. München: P. Kirchheim.

encodingDesc.p: ISO 15919 transliteration, apart from ṃ for anusvāra and ṛ for vocalic ṛ. Underscore to indicate explicit virāma.

body.head: purāṇa sannayē prārambhaya.

namastasmai bhagavaterhate samyak
sambuddhāya ෴

lg.l: sevyatāmakṣayo dhīrāḥ sa śriye cāmṛtāya ca ෴

body.p:
śāstrārambhayehi sarvajñayanaṭa pūjā vidhānakaḷa
kal·hi parahitavū anuśāsanayen vighnopaśa
maya karan·nāvū puṇya sam·pattiya ræs·karan·
nō yasya jñānadayāsindhoḥ yanādi mē so
lovak dæk·vūhu ෴ jñāna, samastavastu viṣayavū
parijñānayen hā; dayā, duḥkhayen samuddharaṇavāṃjā
lakṣaṇavū karuṇāyen; sindhoḥ, sāgarayak væ
nivū nohot uk·talakṣaṇavū jñānadayā de
denāṭa vipulādhāraheyin sāgarayak vænivū;
agādhasya, anut visin pātālatala nodak·nā
lada jñānadayā dedenāgē keḷavara ætiheyin
pirisin̆dagata nohæk·kāvū gāmbhīryya æti; yasya,
yam sarvajñayak·hugē; guṇāḥ, maitrīkṣamopaśa
mādī guṇayō; anaghāḥ, rāgādidoṣa rahitayōda;
he dhīrāḥ, pan̆ḍitavarini; akṣayaḥ, parama karuṇādī
guṇaśālit·vayen·ma parahita sukha sampādanaye
hilā kṣayak næt·tāvū hevat virāmayak næt·
tāvū nohot saṃsārayen sun·darasthānayaṭa
giya bava hetukoṭageṇa ajarāmara heyin kṣa
yak næt·tāvū; saḥ, ē sarvajñatema; śriyeca, tri
vargga sampattiya piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, nivan pi
ṇisada; sevyatām, topa visin sevunālæbē
vā ෴

mē solova sarvajñayan·gē sāgaratvayen
rūpaṇaya heyin sarvajñayan·ṭa hā sāgarayaṭa
ś·leṣayi ෴ mehi samudrayāgē agādhat·vanam pā
tālaya nodæk·kahækibavaya anaghavū guṇayō
nam rat·nākarat·vādihuya akṣayatvanam paripūrṇa
bavaya śrīnam śrīdevatāya amṛtanam amāyayi data
yutu. yasya jñāna dayā sindhoḥ yanādiyen iṣ·ṭa
dēvatāśrīrvāda dæk·vūhu. śriyeca amṛtāyaca yan·
nen sakalajñānapravṛttiya phalaprāmaṇa heyin
pravṛtti phala dæk·vūhu ෴

mē solovehi śleṣayen taman karaṇa
śāstrayāgēda svarūpa kīha. heda mesē datayu
tu ෴ jñānadayā, kavit·va vaktṛt·vādiyehihō
aṣ·ṭādaśa vidyāsthānayehi jñānadāna sampattiya
hetukoṭagena; sindhoḥ, sāgarayak vænivū;
agādhasya, anantaroktavū guṇayogaya he
tukoṭageṇa patul nodæk·ka hæk·kāvū; yasya,
yam śāstrayak·hugē; guṇāḥ, laghut·va viṣ·paṣṭatvādivū
guṇayō; anaghāḥ, śubhahetuhuda; he dhīrāḥ, paṇ·ḍita
varini; akṣayaḥ, sampūrṇavū; saḥ, ē jñānadayāsin·dhuva
temē hevat mē nāmaliṅgānuśāsanaya tema;
śriyeca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada nohot
vāṅmaya śil·pa dænīma lakṣaṇakoṭa æti svārthasam
pat·tiya taddhetukatrivarggahetuvū parārtha sampattī
ya yana mē svārtha sampat parārtha sampat deka
piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, ē svārtha sampat·tiyenudu
puṇyajñāna sambhārayen ayat·nayen siddhavan·
nāvū mokṣaya piṇisada; sevyatām, śruti cin·tā
vyākhyānādi lakṣaṇavū sēvāva karaṇulæbēvā ෴

mē śāstra pakṣayehi dānaṃ dā yana vākya
yehi ḍudāñ-dāne yana dhātuhu keren sam
padādibhyaḥ k·vip·ca yi k·vip kaḷa kal·hi dā kiyā ti
beyi. jñānasya dā jñānadā tasyā īḥ lakṣmīḥ jñāna
de yi vākya geṇa ṣaṣṭhīsamāsakoṭa jñānade
śabdaya siddhakal·hi ohu keren tṛtīyākaḷa
kala jñānadayā yi kiyā rūpaya veyi datayutu ෴
